case_title: GEIJSEN, JACQUES VS BOHNERT, STEVEN C/O PARISIAN BAKERIES, INC.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,030.00 FILED BY GEIJSEN, JACQUES AS TO DEFENDANT BOHNERT, STEVEN  C/O PARISIAN BAKERIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
